audit_status.source_base: Greek James text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact draft reviewed for trials/testing, wisdom, double-mindedness, rich/poor reversal, desire/sin/death chain, implanted word, doers, pure religion.

verses.restored: James, servant of Divine and of Lord Jesus Messiah, to the twelve tribes in the dispersion: rejoice.
Count it all joy, my siblings, whenever you fall into various tests/trials,
knowing that the testing of your trust produces endurance.
And let endurance have complete work, so that you may be complete and whole, lacking in nothing.
But if any of you lacks wisdom, let one ask from the Divine, who gives to all generously and without reproach, and it will be given.
But let one ask in trust, doubting nothing, for the doubting one is like a wave of sea driven and tossed by wind.
For let not that human suppose that one will receive anything from the Lord,
a double-souled human, unstable in all one's ways.
Let the lowly sibling boast in one's height,
and the rich one in one's lowliness, because like flower of grass one will pass away.
For the sun rises with scorching heat and dries the grass, and its flower falls, and the beauty of its face perishes; so also the rich one will fade in one's journeys.
Blessed is the human who endures testing, because having become approved, one will receive the crown of life that he promised to those loving him.
Let no one being tested say, I am tested by the Divine; for the Divine is untested by harmful things and tests no one with harm.
But each one is tested by one's own desire, being drawn out and enticed.
Then desire, having conceived, gives birth to sin/misalignment; and sin/misalignment, having been completed, brings forth death.
Do not be deceived, my beloved siblings.
Every good giving and every complete gift is from above, coming down from the Father of lights, with whom there is no variation or shadow of turning.
Having willed, he gave us birth by word of truth, so that we might be a kind of firstfruit of his creatures.
Know this, my beloved siblings: let every human be swift to hear, slow to speak, slow to anger,
for human anger does not produce the righteousness/justice of the Divine.
Therefore putting away all filth and overflow of harmfulness, receive in gentleness the implanted word able to save/heal your souls/lives.
But become doers of word, and not hearers only, deceiving yourselves.
For if anyone is hearer of word and not doer, this one is like a human observing the face of one's birth in a mirror.
For one observes oneself and goes away and immediately forgets what sort one was.
But the one looking into complete Law, the Law of freedom, and remaining, not becoming forgetful hearer but doer of work, this one will be blessed in one's doing.
If anyone thinks oneself reverent while not bridling one's tongue but deceiving one's heart, this one's reverence is empty.
Pure and undefiled reverence before the Divine and Father is this: to visit orphans and widows in their pressure, and to keep oneself unstained from the world.

translation_notes: James is wisdom-parenesis: tests produce endurance but suffering is not romanticized.
Human anger does not produce Divine justice.
Pure religion is concrete care for vulnerable people plus integrity, not ritual performance alone.
